untranslatable_reason: The signal requires calculation of a custom band derived from (10-day MA of high/low/close ± 10-day MA of the high-low range). This is a Keltner Channel variant that requires computing intraday range-based moving averages not available in the allowed indicator set. ATR_14 is a close approximation but uses 14-day period instead of 10-day, and the exact band construction (midpoint as average of OHLC with range offset) cannot be precisely replicated with available indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated using sma_10 as the central moving average and atr_14 as a volatility band proxy. The true signal requires a custom 10-day range-based band calculation. Position reversal on opposite band penetration is encoded in entry/exit logic. For production use, implement custom Keltner Channel (10,10) indicator.
